s: In 2003, Steve Colyer suited up for LAD as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.750, WHIP 1.580, SO 16, WAR 0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (LAD -> DET).
In 2004, Steve Colyer suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.470, WHIP 1.780, SO 31, WAR -0.600. Notable context: Joined DET.
Changed teams after the previous season (DET -> ATL).
In 2007, Steve Colyer suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.910, WHIP 3.550, SO 4, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined ATL.
